hero.title: Plan Your Perfect Trip
hero.subtitle: AI-powered travel planning made simple
hero.description: Atlas turns your travel aspirations into carefully crafted expedition plans. AI-powered itineraries, gamified exploration, and a passport of memories.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to Atlas Travel Planner. By using our service, you agree to the following terms and conditions.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing or using the Atlas Travel Planner service, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our service.

service.title: 2. Description of Service
service.content: Atlas Travel Planner provides AI-assisted travel planning tools including itinerary generation, destination guides, and pre-trip checklists. The service is provided for personal, non-commercial use.

accounts.title: 3. User Accounts
accounts.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.

ai.title: 4. AI-Generated Content
ai.content: Travel recommendations and itineraries are generated by AI and should be used as suggestions only. Always verify important information such as visa requirements, health advisories, and local regulations through official sources.

privacy.title: 5. Privacy
privacy.content: Your use of the service is also governed by our Privacy Policy. Please review our Privacy Policy to understand our practices.

liability.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: Atlas Travel Planner is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any damages arising from the use of AI-generated travel recommendations.

changes.title: 7. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains how Atlas Travel Planner collects, uses, and protects your personal information.

collection.title: 1. Information We Collect
collection.content: We collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email, and travel preferences. We also collect usage data to improve our service.

usage.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
usage.content: We use your information to provide and improve our travel planning service, personalize your experience, and communicate service updates.

ai.title: 3. AI Processing
ai.content: Your travel preferences are processed by AI models to generate personalized recommendations. We do not share your personal travel data with third-party AI providers in an identifiable format.

storage.title: 4. Data Storage and Security
storage.content: Sensitive data such as passport numbers is encrypted at rest using AES-256-GCM. We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your information.

rights.title: 5. Your Rights
rights.content: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. You can manage your data through your account settings or by contacting our support team.

cookies.title: 6. Cookies and Tracking
cookies.content: We use essential cookies for authentication and session management. No third-party tracking cookies are used.

contact.title: 7. Contact
contact.content: For privacy-related inquiries, please contact our support team through the Support page.

support.title: Support
support.intro: Need help with Atlas Travel Planner? Find answers to common questions or reach out to our team.

q1.question: How do I create a new trip?
q1.answer: Navigate to your dashboard and click 'New Expedition' to start planning a new trip with our guided wizard.

q2.question: How does AI itinerary generation work?
q2.answer: Our AI analyzes your travel preferences, budget, and dates to create a personalized day-by-day itinerary. You can regenerate or customize it as needed.

q3.question: Is my personal data secure?
q3.answer: Yes. Sensitive data like passport numbers is encrypted using AES-256-GCM. We never log personally identifiable information and follow LGPD/GDPR guidelines.

q4.question: How do I delete my account?
q4.answer: Go to Account Settings and scroll to the Danger Zone section. Account deletion is permanent and anonymizes all your data.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: If you could not find the answer you need, reach out to our team.
